home.title: Equity Dashboard
home.noDataYet: No data yet — create your first funding round to get started
home.noAllocations: No allocations yet. Create one from a funding round to start tracking commitments.
home.allRoundsClosed: All rounds are closed. New rounds in progress will appear here.
home.beginCapTableDesc: Create your first funding round, add investors, then allocate shares. The register and cap table update automatically as allocations reach Issued.
home.whatYouCanDo: What you can do with Caploom
home.feature.fundingRoundsDesc: Plan each raise, track commitments from Planned to Issued.
home.feature.investorsDesc: Pipeline + invested. Prospects through invested, all in one place.
home.feature.registerDesc: Append-only ledger of every issued share. Immutable law-of-record view.
home.feature.capTableDesc: Derived from the register. Never directly edited.
home.feature.esopDesc: Pool + grants + vesting. Unallocated shares show on the cap table.
home.feature.valuationDesc: Per-round estimates today; what-if scenario modeling in V2.
home.feature.antiDilutionDesc: Protection clauses today; exit simulation in V2.
home.feature.snapshotsDesc: Auto-saved on every register write. Point-in-time cap tables.
home.quickStartDesc: Follow these steps to set up your cap table. Each step builds on the previous one.
home.step1.title: Set up your company
home.step1.desc: Configure your company name, share structure, and basic settings. This is the foundation for everything else.
home.step2.title: Add your investors & shareholders
home.step2.desc: Register the people and entities who hold or will hold equity — founders, angels, VCs, and advisors.
home.step3.title: Create your first funding round
home.step3.desc: Record your funding round details (pre-money valuation, price per share), then allocate shares to each investor.
home.step4.title: Set up ESOP pool (optional)
home.step4.desc: Reserve shares for employee stock options. Create grant schedules with vesting cliffs and timelines.
home.step5.title: Review your cap table
home.step5.desc: Once allocations reach "Issued" status, your cap table and share register update automatically. Review the result.
home.quickStartTip: Tip: You can also import existing data from Excel to skip manual entry.
home.exploreFeaturesDesc: Beyond the basics, Caploom offers these tools to manage your equity lifecycle:
ev.title: Estimated Valuation
ev.desc: Per-round pre/post money valuation estimates based on funding rounds
ev.roundModelerDesc: Enter valuation parameters to simulate dilution
ev.infoNote: Price per share is calculated as Pre-Money Valuation ÷ Fully Diluted Shares ({{shares}} shares). New shares issued = Capital Raise ÷ Price per Share. This model assumes standard dilution without anti-dilution adjustments.
sc.title: Share Classes
sc.desc: Define equity classes, preferred terms, and liquidation rights
sc.name: Name
sc.noClassesDesc: Create your first share class or seed the defaults (Common + ESOP)
join.invalidLinkDesc: This invitation link is missing a token. Please request a new invitation.
join.notFound: This invitation link does not exist.
join.revoked: This invitation link has been revoked.
join.alreadyAccepted: This invitation has already been accepted.
join.invalidDefault: This invitation is no longer valid.
join.accessConfigured: You've been invited to join as {{role}}. Your access has been configured.
join.invitedAs: You've been invited to join Cap Table Manager as {{role}}.
join.signInToAccept: Sign in to accept this invitation.
join.acceptFailed: Something went wrong while accepting the invitation.
notFound.message: Sorry, the page you are looking for doesn't exist. It may have been moved or deleted.
capTable.title: Cap Table
capTable.desc: Derived from share register. Not editable.
register.title: Share Register
register.desc: Append-only ledger of issued shares, plus the full allocations pipeline.
esop.title: ESOP & Vesting
esop.desc: Employee Stock Option Plan management and grant tracking
esign.title: eSignature
esign.desc: Send equity documents for electronic signature via DocuSeal.
rounds.title: Funding Rounds
rounds.desc: Plan and track each capital raise.
investors.title: Investors
instruments.title: Instruments
instruments.desc: Track SAFEs and convertible notes. Simulate how they convert in your next round.
waterfall.title: Waterfall Analysis
waterfall.desc: Simulate exit distributions based on liquidation preferences and seniority
valuation.title: Valuation & Scenario Modeling
valuation.desc: Estimate per-round valuations today; model hypothetical future rounds.
projections.title: Projections & DCF
projections.desc: Build 5-year financial projections and run DCF valuations
antiDilution.title: Anti-Dilution Protection
antiDilution.desc: Manage anti-dilution provisions and simulate down-round impact on conversion prices.
investorPortal.noAccessDesc: Your account email is not linked to an investor record in this company. Please contact the platform administrator to set up your access.
investorPortal.grantsDesc: Your stock option grants and vesting progress
investorPortal.certsDesc: Download certificates for your issued shares
compliance.409a.title: 409A Valuation
compliance.409a.desc: Track FMV assessments, expiry dates, and active valuation.
compliance.83b.title: 83(b) Election
compliance.83b.desc: Track and manage 83(b) election filing deadlines
compliance.transfers.title: Share Transfers
compliance.transfers.desc: Secondary equity trading and share transfer management
compliance.techShare.title: Tech Share / RSA Tax Tracking
compliance.closedCompany.title: Closed Company Management
compliance.closedCompany.desc: Company Act §356 — Preferred share provisions for closed companies
settings.company.title: Company Settings
settings.company.desc: Manage your company profile, branding, and authorized signatory.
settings.team.title: Team
settings.team.desc: Manage team members, roles, and access permissions.
settings.import.title: Import & Analysis
settings.import.desc: Import your Excel cap table and get AI-powered insights
settings.snapshots.title: Cap Table Snapshots
settings.snapshots.desc: Auto-saved on every register write, plus manual checkpoints. Append-only.
settings.auditLog.title: Audit Log
settings.auditLog.desc: Complete history of all data changes for compliance and traceability.
admin.overview.title: Platform Overview
admin.overview.desc: High-level stats across all companies on Caploom
admin.companies.title: Companies
admin.activity.title: Admin Activity
admin.activity.desc: Log of all platform admin actions — who did what, when
admin.versions.title: Version Log
admin.versions.desc: Platform changelog — all versions and what changed
admin.security.title: Security & Privacy
admin.security.desc: Encryption, key management, and data protection architecture
admin.payment.title: Payment Integration
admin.payment.desc: Subscription billing and payment processing architecture
error.title: Something went wrong
error.desc: Failed to load data. Please check your connection and try again.
onboarding.welcomeDesc: Let's set up your company profile. This takes less than a minute.
onboarding.companyNamePlaceholder: e.g. 台灣生技股份有限公司
onboarding.creatingDesc: Creating company profile and initializing your workspace.
onboarding.doneDesc: "{{name}}" has been created. You can now start managing your cap table.
onboarding.tip1: Go to Company Settings to add more details (address, representative, etc.)
onboarding.tip2: Follow the Quick Start guide on the dashboard to set up your cap table
onboarding.skip: Skip for now — I'll set up later
onboarding.timeoutError: Request timed out. Please try again.
